name: file-organization
description: Organize local files into a clear folder structure with a safe plan first.
instructions: Inspect the target directory with filesystem tools. Propose a simple organization plan based on file type, project, date, or user-provided rules. Avoid destructive changes unless explicitly requested. Move or create files only inside allowed directories. Finish with a summary of every change.

examples.input: Organize my Downloads folder by file type
examples.output: A safe move plan and summary of created folders and moved files.

author: Neura
